title: CAISO LMP Scheduling Point Tie Real Time 5 Min CSV download
description:
Five-minute LMPs for Scheduling Point (SP) - Intertie (Tie) combinations. Interchange schedules are settled at the relevant SP-Tie combination. Both the SP and the Tie are declared by a scheduling coordinator when submitting a bid, while for registered system resources, the SP is their PNode/APNode, and the Tie is the registered primary intertie. 

The data is known to contain gaps originating in the CAISO Source.
